# Daily Autonomous Campaign Loop

## Inputs

- Product facts
- Buyer language
- Yesterday's results
- Active campaign list
- Tactic performance memory

## Steps

1. Read active campaign memory.
2. Identify one bottleneck: attention, click, conversion, activation, or quality.
3. Select one tactic card.
4. Generate 3 to 10 variants.
5. Produce a platform packet.
6. Write a measurement expectation.
7. Update run log.

## Output

```markdown
# Daily Campaign Update

## What changed
## Why
## Expected effect
## Metrics to watch
## Stop/pause condition
## Memory update
```
